scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm --external effect --external 'effect/*' --external '@effect/*' --external '@relayfx/*' --external '@batonfx/*'
scripts.test: vitest --root ../.. run packages/runtime/test && bun test test/execution-backend.native.test.ts && bun test test/standard-tool-transcripts.native.test.ts && bun test test/multi-agent.native.test.ts && bun test test/workflow.native.test.ts && bun test test/subagent-spawn.native.test.ts
